sections.paragraph: m. the thumb, Exo 29:20 (so called because it shuts the hand); also, the great toe, according as it is followed by יָד or רֶגֶּל Lev 8:23, seq.; 14:14 , 17 Lev 14:17, 25 Lev 14:25, 28 Lev 14:28. Pl. constr. בְּהֹוננֹות Jud 1:6, Jdg 1:7, from the unused sing. בְּהֹון. Arab. إِبْهَامُ, and in the common language بُهْمُ id.
